sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91719" key="puriplhqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρι-πληθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n91719.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of fire</tr_>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
